**Executive Summary:**  
The most critical development is the **extreme bearishness in politics (12 signals, 88% confidence)**, signaling heightened geopolitical risk, particularly with the **99.9% polymarket consensus for an Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire extension by April 26, 2026
